title: Sales & Marketing Support Executive
description:
The Lead Generation & Marketing Support Specialist will focus on identifying potential clients, promoting our outsourced customer service solutions, and supporting sales and marketing initiatives.

Key Duties & Responsibilities

  • Research and identify potential business leads using online platforms, databases, and industry-specific tools

  • Conduct cold outreach (calls, emails, social media) to promote contact centre and BPO services to prospects

  • Initiate and manage lead engagement through calls, email campaigns, and video conferencing

  • Present tailored business proposals and deliver compelling demo sessions to prospective clients

  • Create and customize sales presentations and marketing materials aligned with the company’s branding and service offerings

  • Collaborate with the sales team to support customer acquisition and retention strategies

  • Analyze market trends, industry shifts, and competitor offerings to refine outreach strategies

Qualifications & Experience

  • Tertiary qualifications in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field

  • At least 2 years of experience in lead generation, sales support, or customer service—ideally in the BPO or outsourcing industry

Other Requirements

  • Experience with SEO, social media marketing, and digital design tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe)

  • Familiarity with contact centre AI tools such as conversational AI Platforms, chatbots, virtual agents, speech analytics tools, AI powered CRM/ Quality Management tools

  • Proactive, self-motivated, and skilled in problem-solving and initiative-taking

  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage corporate clients

postedCompany.description:
TELE-CENTRE SERVICES PTE LTD

Tele-centre Services Pte Ltd, a wholly-owned subsidiary of mainboard listed Hai Leck Holdings Ltd was established in the last 90s. Today, the Company operates a premium call centre with more than 250 employees in Singapore, and pride itself to have major multi-national companies and key government organisations across all industries as its valuable business partners.

Our parent company, Hai Leck Holdings Limited is a leading integrated provider of scaffolding, insulation, painting and engineering services for the utilities, oil and gas industries in Singapore.

Tele-centre attributes its success to the high quality customer service and innovative business solutions provided by its human capital, and its continuous pursuit of excellence in systems and processes. 



Personal Data Collection Statement

Tele-centre Services Pte Ltd recognizes its obligation under the Personal Data Protection Act 2012 which includes the collection, use and disclosure of personal data for the purpose for which an individual has given consent to. The personal data collected includes all personal data voluntarily provided by you in this form, or in any supplementary form or any document voluntarily provided by you to the Company.

We may collect and use your personal data for:

· Conducting interviews;

· Process your job application which includes pre-recruitment checks involving your qualification and facilitating interviews;

· Provide or obtain employee references and for backgrounds screening;

· Assess your suitability for the position applied for;

· Process staff referrals;

· Any other purposes relating to any of the above

More information on our data protection policy can be found on our website at https://www.tele-centre.com/privacy-policy/. 


Employment Application Practice

Your personal data will be kept for a period of up to 12 months to access your suitability for future employment. Upon on your nature of your request, you may withdraw the consent for us to collect, use or disclose your personal data as long as there is no legal or contractual restriction preventing you from doing so.

For more information about PDPA generally, please visit the Personal Data Protection Commission’s website at https://www.pdpc.gov.sg/ 


Declaration:

I declare that to the best of my knowledge and the particulars provided are true. I hereby give my consent to the Company to check my employment records with my previous employers. I am aware that any false or misleading statements made by me may result in dismissal without any compensation if employed. I understand that Company may be unable to process this application if I fail to provide any information requested in this application form and my personal data will be used for recruitment and other employment related purposes for the Company.
